name: hb_2_11
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-25 for Ligong station and North Pump House station compute and store: mean_pm25_ligong, mean_aqi_ligong, mean_pm25_pumphouse, mean_aqi_pumphouse (float).

turns.query: Analyze pollution levels and emission impacts between Ligong station and North Pump House station on 2025-06-25, considering nearby enterprise activities.
